sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21681" key="gastroxa/rubdis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γαστρο-χάρυβδις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n21681.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a gulf of a belly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:397" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">397</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
